title: Alakadalin Akkare
subTitle: Verendran, a smuggler, kills Mohan, a coast guard officer, only to discover that Mohan's father Balu is a witness. When Verendran sets out to kill Balu, his grandson Anand comes to his rescue.

title: Ankiliyude Tharattu
subTitle: Ankiliyude Tharattu

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: C.I.D Unnikrishnan B.A. Bed
subTitle: Trainee detectives Unnikrishnan, Prem and Ommen try their best to outdo each other and investigate a case in order to get employed at a private detective agency.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Varsham
subTitle: Venu, the owner of a small-scale finance firm, loses his son in an unfortunate incident. He gets involved in a lot of social work that soon leads him to become an obstacle in the way of his rivals.

title: Vishnulokam
subTitle: Circus performer Sankunni's heart is captured by village belle, Savithrikutty. However, this romantic pursuit is complicated by a rival's sinister intentions, testing Sankunni's resolve and talents.

title: Kanamarayathu
subTitle: Sherly, an orphan, falls in love with Roy not knowing that he is her financial supporter. However, Roy keeps his distance from her due to their age gap.

title: I. G. - Inspector General
subTitle: Inspector General Durga Prasad is promoted to head the anti-terrorism squad. However, things take a turn when he is forced to choose between his family and his job.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Lal Salam
subTitle: Nettoor Stephen, T K Antony and Sethulakshmi, three communist comrades, struggle to empower the labour class people. They get imprisoned when a landlord gets killed during an uprising.

title: Peruvannapurathe Visheshangal
subTitle: Kunjulakshmi, pampered by her brothers, is somewhat arrogant. When she falsely accuses Sivashankaran, a peon, of misbehaving with her, he decides to teach her a lesson.

title: Ambili
subTitle: Ambili, a naive and wide-eyed young man, is adored by everyone for his quirky traits. He hopes to marry his childhood love, Tina, and restore the lost bond with his friend and Tina's brother, Bobby.

title: Kaaliya Mardhanam
subTitle: Geetha's murder is pinned on Ramu, the man she rejected, while the real culprits, Johnny, Rahim, Swami and Kannan, get off scot-free. However, the four spoilt brats fail to elude their karma.

title: Aashrayam
subTitle: The relationship between a woman and her husband takes a turn for the worse when the her former flame resurfaces in her life.

title: Aalibabayum Aarara Kallanmarum
subTitle: Diwakaran, a thief, steals jewellery from Aravindakshan, a school teacher. Jayashankar, a police officer, is appointed to investigate the case who in reality is Diwakaran's brother-in-law.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Chaakara
subTitle: After his release from prison, Sethu vows to avenge the injustice meted out to him by a corrupt businessman. However, Sethu's former lover tries to convince him to give up on his quest for revenge.

title: Mimics Action 500
subTitle: Mamachan, a Christian, and Sharada, a Hindu, have twelve children. Half of them follow Christian faith and the rest follow Hinduism, leading to several hilarious incidents in the house.

title: Artham
subTitle: Narendran agrees to help Janardhan live a free life by going to prison in his place. However, when he comes to know that Janardhan has mysteriously died, he sets out to get revenge.

title: KodumKattu
subTitle: Police officers Sudheendran, Balachandran and Jayadevan are tasked to find a culprit, who brutally murdered the family of IG Sekharan Thampi.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: 3 Dots
subTitle: Three ex-convicts, Vishnu, Pappan, and Louis, want to reform themselves by taking help from Dr Isaac, the prison counsellor. However, Dr Isaac has different intentions which will land them in trouble.

title: Pravachakan
subTitle: Balu is forced to follow the family profession of fortune-telling against his dream of becoming a film actor. His life changes when some of his predictions come true and he becomes famous.

title: Thuruppugulan
subTitle: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

title: Agni Muhurtham
subTitle: Vinayan, a simple worker, ascends to power within the family's enterprise after his marriage to a businessman's daughter. However, when his father-in-law is found dead, he becomes the prime suspect.

title: Sharam
subTitle: Sunil marries Varma's mentally disabled sister, then attempts to kill her, as police investigate his motives for these shocking actions.

title: Thenkasipattanam
subTitle: A man, who harbours feelings for his childhood friend, hides the truth from his best friend. However, trouble arises when his best friend falls in love with her.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Swagatham
subTitle: Two Hindu siblings happily live with each other. Problems occur when the sister falls in love with a Christian and the brother opposes it.

title: Vaisali
subTitle: A revered priest curses a prosperous kingdom after the king disrespects its venerated guests. Eventually, the king seeks help from a beautiful mistress to convince a sage to break the curse.

title: Dheem Tharikida Thom
subTitle: A naive young man joins a ballet group to impress his lady love. However, hilarity ensues after a case of mistaken identity threatens to destroy their blooming romance.

title: Kouthuka Varthakal
subTitle: Mathew, a flirt, unknowingly pursues his friend Ravi's fiancée. However, when Ravi learns about it, suspicions arise, testing their friendship and love.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Oru Vadakkan Selfie
subTitle: When his father asks him to manage their grocery store, Umesh runs away to Chennai to become a film-maker. His life changes after he takes a selfie with his old neighbour and posts it online.

title: Bandhukkal Sathrukkal
subTitle: Two brothers, both moneylenders, hate each other and extend their mutual hatred to their families as well. However, they face several obstacles that intensify after their estrangement.

title: Kudumba Vishesham
subTitle: Madhavan Nair and his family are tenants in Kikkilikochamma's house. When Madhavan's brother Prasad and his family decide to stay with him, Kikkilikochamma plans to drive everybody out.
